'''dahab''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:half siblings|half siblings]] (father's female phase)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:half siblings|half siblings]] (father's female phase)
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæhibith|dæhibith]] || [[word:dæhibij|dæhibij]] || [[word:dæhibish|dæhibish]] || [[word:dæhibi|dæhibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahuhubuth|dahuhubuth]] || [[word:dahuhubuj|dahuhubuj]] || [[word:dahuhubush|dahuhubush]] || [[word:dahuhubu|dahuhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahubuth|dahubuth]] || [[word:dahubuj|dahubuj]] || [[word:dahubush|dahubush]] || [[word:dahubu|dahubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahufbuth|dahufbuth]] || [[word:dahufbuj|dahufbuj]] || [[word:dahufbush|dahufbush]] || [[word:dahufbuf|dahufbuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæhebeth|dæhebeth]] || [[word:dæhebej|dæhebej]] || [[word:dæhebesh|dæhebesh]] || [[word:dæhebe|dæhebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahohoboth|dahohoboth]] || [[word:dahohoboj|dahohoboj]] || [[word:dahohobosh|dahohobosh]] || [[word:dahohobo|dahohobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahoboth|dahoboth]] || [[word:dahoboj|dahoboj]] || [[word:dahobosh|dahobosh]] || [[word:dahobo|dahobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahofboth|dahofboth]] || [[word:dahofboj|dahofboj]] || [[word:dahofbosh|dahofbosh]] || [[word:dahofbof|dahofbof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || — || — || — || [[word:dahïfbïf|dahïfbïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || — || — || — || [[word:dahïfhïfbïf|dahïfhïfbïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæhæbæth|dæhæbæth]] || [[word:dæhæbæj|dæhæbæj]] || [[word:dæhæbæsh|dæhæbæsh]] || [[word:dæhæbæ|dæhæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dahahabath|dahahabath]] || [[word:dahahabaj|dahahabaj]] || [[word:dahahabash|dahahabash]] || [[word:dahahaba|dahahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dahabath|dahabath]] || [[word:dahabaj|dahabaj]] || [[word:dahabash|dahabash]] || [[word:dahaba|dahaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dahafbath|dahafbath]] || [[word:dahafbaj|dahafbaj]] || [[word:dahafbash|dahafbash]] || [[word:dahafbaf|dahafbaf]]
|}

''50 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dahabatha|dahabatha]] || [[word:dahabaja|dahabaja]] || [[word:dahabasha|dahabasha]] || [[word:dahabaka|dahabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dahabath|dahabath]] || [[word:dahabaj|dahabaj]] || [[word:dahabash|dahabash]] || [[word:dahaba|dahaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dahabathal|dahabathal]] || [[word:dahabajal|dahabajal]] || [[word:dahabashal|dahabashal]] || [[word:dahabakal|dahabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dahabathatha|dahabathatha]] || [[word:dahabajaja|dahabajaja]] || [[word:dahabashasha|dahabashasha]] || [[word:dahabaka|dahabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dahabathan|dahabathan]] || [[word:dahabajan|dahabajan]] || [[word:dahabashan|dahabashan]] || [[word:dahabakan|dahabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dahabathaoro|dahabathaoro]] || [[word:dahabajaoro|dahabajaoro]] || [[word:dahabashaoro|dahabashaoro]] || [[word:dahabakaoro|dahabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
